title: thymus × cistetorum
intro: Thymus × cistetorum, also known as Creeping Thyme or Wild Thyme, is a low-growing, flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This medicinal plant is valued for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thymus × cistetorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve stress, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Thymus × cistetorum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or added to skincare products, making it a versatile and natural remedy for various health concerns.
